nodes.context: A gang active in Northwest Territories and British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and murder.

edges.context: The 856 Gang made ties to Hells Angels member Len Pelletier in 2007, indicating an alliance.
The 856 Gang is thought to be rivals of the Hells Angels, with a member convicted of manslaughter of a Hells Angel.
The infobox lists Red Scorpions as allies of the 856 Gang.
The infobox lists UN Gang as rivals of the 856 Gang.
